entities.name: RESIDUE RETENTION
entities.description: The practice of leaving crop residues on the field to improve soil health and suppress weeds

entities.name: WEED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of controlling or eliminating weeds to reduce competition with crops

entities.name: CONSERVATION FARMING
entities.description: An agricultural system based on minimum soil disturbance and residue retention

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers managing small plots of land, typically in southern Africa

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where conservation farming uptake is being analyzed

entities.name: MATOPOS RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The specific research facility in Zimbabwe where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: BULAWAYO
entities.description: The city in Zimbabwe where the Matopos Research Station is located

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the agricultural study was performed

entities.name: WEED BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of weeds measured in the experimental plots

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Zea mays, a cereal crop used to evaluate yield responses to residue and weeding

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, a cereal crop used to evaluate yield responses to residue and weeding

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area for maize and sorghum

entities.name: CLAY LOAM
entities.description: A soil type characterized by a mixture of clay and loam used in the experiment

entities.name: SANDY SOIL
entities.description: A soil type characterized by a high proportion of sand used in the experiment

entities.name: SPLIT-PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental layout used to test the effects of residue retention and weeding methods

entities.name: HOE-WEEDING
entities.description: A manual method of weed control using a hoe

entities.name: GLYPHOSATE
entities.description: A chemical herbicide used for weed control in the study

entities.name: ZAMWIPE
entities.description: A mechanical tool used for the application of glyphosate

entities.name: SC 403
entities.description: A specific cultivar of maize used in the experiment

entities.name: MACIA
entities.description: A specific variety of sorghum used in the experiment

entities.name: WEED SUPPRESSION
entities.description: The reduction of weed growth resulting from residue retention

entities.name: MIXED CROPLIVESTOCK SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems that integrate both crop production and livestock rearing
